dogfooding · texo remembers texo

Its own docs, on the record.

claims
—
docs
—
superseded
—

texo ingested its own repository — every ADR, the spec, the architecture notes — and extracted each factual claim with a receipt back to the source line. Pick a document: the left pane is the raw source it read, the right pane is what it remembers. Superseded claims point back to the exact line they were retired from.

—

loading the corpus…

what texo remembers
